claim_boundary: Boundary Axiom B1 and its intrinsic action are a provisional freeze, not a P1 derivation. Exact intrinsic M4 Lorentz structure is obtained, while one-normalization coefficient locking, the shifted junction background, scalar potential, full spectrum, physical gauge interpretation, absolute units, fermions, and Standard Model closure remain open.
connection: tau_A times the fixed trace index becomes the inverse squared canonical self-interaction
metric: h is fixed to the induced metric, so C_partial a_min^2 cannot be removed by a metric convention
scalar: with U_partial=0 and no scalar matching/source, Z_partial is removed by s=sqrt(Z_partial)sigma_partial
with_scalar_potential_or_matching: Z_partial re-enters through canonical masses/couplings, restoring a third independently sourced combination
